raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/assessment/energy-picker.tsx", "issue": "Energy Adaptation UI exists but does not dynamically adapt based on real-time user behavior or system load. Static thresholds undermine Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) by failing to personalize energy modes.", "recommended_fix": "Integrate dynamic threshold calibration using user interaction latency and task completion patterns. Update energy-picker.tsx to adjust mode triggers based on observed behavior over 3+ sessions."}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts", "memory/swarm/skills/energy-adaptation-behavioral-model.md"]}

findings.issue: Energy Adaptation UI exists but does not dynamically adapt based on real-time user behavior or system load. Static thresholds undermine Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) by failing to personalize energy modes.
findings.recommended_fix: Integrate dynamic threshold calibration using user interaction latency and task completion patterns. Update energy-picker.tsx to adjust mode triggers based on observed behavior over 3+ sessions.
